variants: Ephrem Lemma graduated from Indigo Stream College, where he laid the groundwork for his career in alchemy. He holds a professional license known as the Junction Alchemist Document, certifying his expertise in the field. Ephrem's contributions have been showcased in Clouded Ridge Books, reflecting his dedication to knowledge sharing. As the Diversity Officer at Meadowgate Forum, he is actively involved in community initiatives aimed at enhancing inclusivity. Fluent in the Cantonese dialect, Ephrem is skilled at engaging with a diverse audience, enabling effective communication in his professional endeavors.
